name: Miss Hulling's Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and grate or run through a fine food chopper.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the grated potatoes and mix until well combined.
3. Heat shortening in a skillet so that it forms a 1/4-inch layer.
4. Spoon pancake batter into the hot fat, using a spatula to spread it evenly.
5. Cook until brown on one side, then flip and brown the other side.
6. Drain excess oil on paper towels or cloth.
7. Serve hot with applesauce.
Helpful Hint: The amount of flour needed may vary depending on the water content in the potatoes.
